2.solution:
4A=B+C+D+E and 4B=A+C+D+E. Subtract: 4A‚ąí4B=B‚ąíA ‚Üí 5A=5B ‚Üí A=B. Similarly A=C.
‚Üí From 4A=A+A+D+E: 2A=D+E ‚Üí A=(D+E)/2=37.
‚Üí Avg of A,B,C = A = 37.
Answer: D (37).

3.solution:
Sum of first N odd numbers = N¬≤. Each student drops one odd number (2i‚ąí1), computing avg = (N¬≤‚ąí(2i‚ąí1))/(N‚ąí1).
‚Üí Sum of all N averages = ő£(N¬≤‚ąí(2i‚ąí1))/(N‚ąí1) = [N¬≥‚ąíN¬≤]/(N‚ąí1) = N¬≤.
‚Üí Avg of averages = N¬≤/N = N = 43.
Answer: 43.

4.solution:
Let total = T. When youngest leaves: (T‚ąíyoungest)/16=23 ‚Üí T‚ąíyoungest=368.
When oldest leaves: (T‚ąíoldest)/16=21 ‚Üí T‚ąíoldest=336.
‚Üí oldest‚ąíyoungest=32. Also oldest+youngest=44 (avg=22) ‚Üí oldest=38, youngest=6.
‚Üí T = 368+6 = 374. Avg = 374/17 = 22.
Answer: A (22).

5.solution:
P=10a+b, reverse=10b+a. Q=10c+d, reverse=10d+c.
‚Üí Sum change = (Q+revQ)‚ąí(P+revP) = 11(c+d)‚ąí11(a+b) = 11[(c+d)‚ąí(a+b)].
‚Üí Avg change = 11[(c+d)‚ąí(a+b)]/22 = 3.5 ‚Üí (c+d)‚ąí(a+b) = 7.
Answer: 7.

6.solution:
Let R+W=52 (avg 26). At birth of 1st child (year t1): 52+2t1=66 ‚Üí t1=7.
At birth of 2nd (year t2): 52+3t2‚ąí7=81 ‚Üí t2=12.
At birth of 3rd (year t3): 52+4t3‚ąí(7+12)=105 ‚Üí 4t3=72 ‚Üí t3=18.
Answer: 18 years after marriage.

7.solution:
Wed=36=Thu+3‚ÜíThu=33; Thu=Fri+3‚ÜíFri=30; Fri=Sat+3‚ÜíSat=27; Sat=Sun+3‚ÜíSun=24.
‚Üí Avg(Mon‚ÄďThu)=(32+34+36+33)/4=33.75. Avg(Fri‚ÄďSun)=(30+27+24)/3=27.
‚Üí Difference=33.75‚ąí27=6.75¬įC.
Answer: D (6.75¬įC).

8.solution:
New avg increase = (24N+88)/(N+3)‚ąí24 = 16/(N+3). Must be prime.
‚Üí 16/(N+3) prime ‚Üí N+3 must divide 16. Only prime divisor of 16 is 2 ‚Üí N+3=8 ‚Üí N=5.
Answer: 5.

9.solution:
First 13 multiples of k: avg=7k. Remove mth multiple (mk):
‚Üí Max new avg (m=1): 90k/12=7.5k. Min (m=13): 78k/12=6.5k.
‚Üí Total range = (7.5k‚ąí6.5k)/7k = 1/7 ‚Čą 14.28%.
Answer: C (14.28%).

10.solution:
Sum=282. After halving one number: new sum=249. Halved number=2√ó(282‚ąí249)=66.
‚Üí Other 3 sum=216; √∑8 gives AP with cd=3: a‚ąí3,a,a+3 ‚Üí 3a=27 ‚Üí a=9 ‚Üí 6,9,12.
‚Üí Numbers: 48,72,96. Smallest=48, Largest=96. (96‚ąí48)/96=50%.
Answer: B (50%).
